properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C4 V5 C6 V7 C6

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Sometimes we pray, “Father let this cup pass from me” But now we to cry out, “Just once more, Lord” on bended knees Lord, We see just one touch of the hem of Your garment It brought change and full deliverance So I’m casting all fear for There’s power in prayer Only believe

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Only believe, you let nothing stand in your way All Issues of blood, all troubles and Confusion Will have to go back through hell’s gates You Put your feet on the necks of these kings And Look to the bleeding Lamb that was slain And Only believe, just confess it and you’ll receive

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Our prophet longed, Saints he longed to see that seventh dove And Lord now we long for you to come Come and fill us now Sweet Holy Spirit, sweet heavenly Dove Brood over us Lord Find your resting place in our hearts

verse.name: C4
verse.lines: And we Only believe and let nothing stand in our way All Issues of blood, all troubles and Confusion Will have to go back through hell’s gates We'll Put your feet on the necks of all these kings We Look to the bleeding Lamb that was slain And Only believe, just confess it and we’ll receive

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: The Lord, He's my Rock, my Light and Salvation, in Him I believe And by His blood I rebuke all lying vanities For though an host should encamp against me To release fear and insecurities Yet I stand confident And Lord You will keep and deliver me

verse.name: C6
verse.lines: Oh Lord we Only believe Let nothing stand in our way All Issues of blood, all troubles and Confusion Will have to go back through hell’s gates We'll Put your feet on the necks of these kings We Look to the bleeding Lamb that was slain And we believe, just confess it and we’ll receive

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: The Dove is saying, “Shalom, shalom. (I here Him saying, "Shalom, shalom") Peace be unto you Shalom, shalom” (All troubles there are over) (Its a dawning up a new day) (Soon we're going home) (My beloved Bride, soon you'll be of Me) On the wings of that Seventh Dove
